name: Froglet
description: Read-only Froglet marketplace and provider discovery tools for OpenClaw.

marketplaceUrl.description: Base URL for the Froglet marketplace, for example http://127.0.0.1:9090.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for marketplace and provider requests.

defaultSearchLimit.description: Default marketplace search size when the tool caller omits a limit.

maxSearchLimit.description: Hard ceiling applied to marketplace search limits.
